---
description: "Use when writing or editing English ability text for 围城之夜 (Siege Night) custom script characters. Covers wording conventions that differ from official BotC style."
---

# 围城之夜 英文描述约定

## Puppet 用 "a Puppet" 而非 "the Puppet"

官方 BotC 角色描述惯例用 "the [角色名]"（如 "the Drunk"），因为每个角色通常只有一个实例。

围城之夜的 Puppet 不同——场上可以**同时存在多个 Puppet**（Hexer 每晚制造一个、Wounded 死后制造一个、Mole 第一夜制造两个等），所以一律写 **"a Puppet"**。

### 正确示例

- ✅ "they become a Puppet"
- ✅ "trigger a Puppet's death ability"
- ❌ "they become the Puppet"
- ❌ "trigger the Puppet's death ability"
